MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Unknown
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Natalie Garcia Lashinsky of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant / moving party Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT FRASER'S BOILER SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings of the fifth cause of action (Negligence II - Survival) is granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed and there is no potentially effective amendment that could avoid the survival claim being time-barred pursuant to C.C.P. 340.2(a), (b). Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)
